title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 3 Livestream
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 held its final day of main-stage programming on July 2, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The livestream featured keynotes, talks, and a startup battlefield competition, serving as a major industry gathering point.
writeup: This livestream captures the final day of main-stage programming at AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held July 2, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The day featured keynotes, talks, and a startup battlefield competition. The event functions as a major gathering point for the AI engineering industry.
